source: File facade runtime backlog and file-facade-runtime-policy shared common prototype distilled into a pre-KMP readiness manifest
description: Pins the low-level public file facade behavior families that must remain covered before read, write, and delete command planning delegates to shared KMP runtime code.

expected.commonDecision: File facade runtime migration may proceed only after file-facade-runtime-policy.json and this readiness manifest are executable from shared commonTest, Android and iOS facade tests continue to reference the same vectors, directory-list traversal vectors remain linked, runtime-error-policy.json keeps malformed-directory, response-error, transport-error, empty read payload, delete request failure, write progress before completion, read/write/delete response-error, and write-stream failure behavior covered, public facade error mapping is pinned, and the shared tests are compile-verified.

commonRuntimePrototype.status: executable shared commonTest runtime planning guard
commonRuntimePrototype.reason: Declared because this vector is consumed by runtime or fake-transport policy tests before production KMP migration.

notes: This readiness manifest is a migration gate for low-level public file facade behavior-family completeness only; empty read payloads, delete request failures, write progress before completion, directory traversal, malformed directory parsing, response-error mapping, public facade error mapping, platform adapter references, and compile verification remain required before production file facade runtime code moves to shared KMP.
